title: Prepare competition vehicles at motor sport events
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Prepare competition vehicles at motor sport events demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for work

pcs.text: Determine job requirements from event information and check against ‘on the day’ operating conditions, and seek required clarification of specifications 1.2 Select and check tools and equipment for serviceability1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.4 Clean work area and lay out for job requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job requirements from event information and check against ‘on the day’ operating conditions, and seek required clarification of specifications 1.2 Select and check tools and equipment for serviceability1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.4 Clean work area and lay out for job requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job requirements from event information and check against ‘on the day’ operating conditions, and seek required clarification of specifications 1.2 Select and check tools and equipment for serviceability1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.4 Clean work area and lay out for job requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for work

elements.title: Finalise technical preparation

pcs.text: Configure vehicle settings for each race2.2 Report problems with work area or operation of equipment to persons according to team procedures as required2.3 Propose modifications or adaptation of equipment as required according to team procedures2.4 Document vehicle settings according to team procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Configure vehicle settings for each race2.2 Report problems with work area or operation of equipment to persons according to team procedures as required2.3 Propose modifications or adaptation of equipment as required according to team procedures2.4 Document vehicle settings according to team procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Configure vehicle settings for each race2.2 Report problems with work area or operation of equipment to persons according to team procedures as required2.3 Propose modifications or adaptation of equipment as required according to team procedures2.4 Document vehicle settings according to team procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Finalise technical preparation

elements.title: Conduct pre-race checks

pcs.text: Carry out checks according to team checklists and without causing damage to components3.2 Report problems with components or systems as required to persons according to team procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out checks according to team checklists and without causing damage to components3.2 Report problems with components or systems as required to persons according to team procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out checks according to team checklists and without causing damage to components3.2 Report problems with components or systems as required to persons according to team procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Conduct pre-race checks

elements.title: Prepare vehicle for scrutineering

pcs.text: Inspect vehicle systems and safety components according to regulatory body requirements, category rules and supplementary regulations4.2 Identify and rectify problems with vehicle compliance according to team procedures as required4.3 Report problems with vehicle compliance that cannot be rectified to persons according to team procedures as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect vehicle systems and safety components according to regulatory body requirements, category rules and supplementary regulations4.2 Identify and rectify problems with vehicle compliance according to team procedures as required4.3 Report problems with vehicle compliance that cannot be rectified to persons according to team procedures as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect vehicle systems and safety components according to regulatory body requirements, category rules and supplementary regulations4.2 Identify and rectify problems with vehicle compliance according to team procedures as required4.3 Report problems with vehicle compliance that cannot be rectified to persons according to team procedures as required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Prepare vehicle for scrutineering

elements.title: Conduct between-race maintenance

pcs.text: Inspect condition of components and systems according to team checklist, and repair or replace as required according to safety requirements and team procedures5.2 Clean and refuel vehicle according to team procedures and safety and environmental requirements5.3 Collect and log vehicle manual and electronic data according to team procedures5.4 Conduct driver or rider technical debrief according to team procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect condition of components and systems according to team checklist, and repair or replace as required according to safety requirements and team procedures5.2 Clean and refuel vehicle according to team procedures and safety and environmental requirements5.3 Collect and log vehicle manual and electronic data according to team procedures5.4 Conduct driver or rider technical debrief according to team procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect condition of components and systems according to team checklist, and repair or replace as required according to safety requirements and team procedures5.2 Clean and refuel vehicle according to team procedures and safety and environmental requirements5.3 Collect and log vehicle manual and electronic data according to team procedures5.4 Conduct driver or rider technical debrief according to team procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Conduct between-race maintenance

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 6.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures6.3 Complete team and event documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 6.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures6.3 Complete team and event documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 6.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures6.3 Complete team and event documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E6: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
